title: Motorboat Operators
description: Operate small motor-driven boats. May assist in navigational activities.

tasks.text: Operate engine throttles and steering mechanisms to guide boats on desired courses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct safety operations in emergency situations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Secure boats to docks with mooring lines, and cast off lines to enable departure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain desired courses, using compasses or electronic navigational aids.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and direct the activities of crew members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Follow safety procedures to ensure the protection of passengers, cargo, and vessels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain equipment such as range markers, fire extinguishers, boat fenders, lines, pumps, and fittings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report any observed navigational hazards to authorities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oversee operation of vessels used for carrying passengers, motor vehicles, or goods across rivers, harbors, lakes, and coastal waters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Service motors by performing tasks such as changing oil and lubricating parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange repairs, fuel, and supplies for vessels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Issue directions for loading, unloading, and seating in boats.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean boats and repair hulls and superstructures, using hand tools, paint, and brushes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Tow, push, or guide other boats, barges, logs, or rafts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take depth soundings in turning basins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform general labor duties such as repairing booms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
